name: @workspace/amynest-capacitor
description: Capacitor wrapper for AmyNest — builds iOS (Xcode) + Android from the kidschedule PWA

scripts.build:web: BASE_PATH=/ PORT=3000 VITE_FIREBASE_API_KEY=${FIREBASE_API_KEY} VITE_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN} VITE_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID} VITE_FIREBASE_APP_ID=${FIREBASE_APP_ID} VITE_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID} VITE_FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY=${VITE_FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY} pnpm --filter @workspace/kidschedule run build && node scripts/copy-www.mjs
scripts.build:ios: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
